question: q02
question_title: 多国应用与待改进国家选择
statement: Apply your model to several countries, and then select a nation whose system of higher education has room for improvement based on your analysis.
methods: 把同一健康度模型应用到 Germany、United States、Japan、Australia 和 Brazil，按 current score、room for improvement 和 weakest dimension 选择转型对象。

data_source.source_pdf: /Users/wuxiaojun/code/Math-Modeling-World/docs/mcm-2015-2025/official_assets/2021/Checking the Pulse and Temperature of Higher Education

access_equity.definition: Students can enter, persist, and complete higher education across income, region, gender, race, and first-generation status.

affordability.definition: Tuition, debt, living cost, and public aid do not block participation or completion.

degree_value.definition: Graduates gain durable employment, civic, and personal value from credentials.

quality_and_learning.definition: Institutions deliver strong instruction, student support, and measurable learning.

research_and_exchange.definition: The system supports research, exchange of ideas, and international student flows.

funding_stability.definition: Public and private resources are stable enough for long-run planning.

innovation_renewal.definition: The system can align around a shared vision, execute it, and renew itself over time.

parameters.source_note: Official PDF statement parameters only; national score rows are deterministic planning inputs for audit and replacement.

country_applications.method: apply the same health model to several national systems and identify a country with improvement room

health_model.method: weighted national higher-education health model aligned with access, affordability, value, quality, research, funding, and renewal

dimension_rows.definition: Students can enter, persist, and complete higher education across income, region, gender, race, and first-generation status.
Tuition, debt, living cost, and public aid do not block participation or completion.
Graduates gain durable employment, civic, and personal value from credentials.
Institutions deliver strong instruction, student support, and measurable learning.
The system supports research, exchange of ideas, and international student flows.
Public and private resources are stable enough for long-run planning.
The system can align around a shared vision, execute it, and renew itself over time.

health_model.healthy_state_rule: A national system is healthy when every dimension is at least 0.70 and the weighted health score is at least 0.75.
